global.headerHelper: Levels unlock access to bigger goals and bigger rewards. Complete all Professional Standards, complete at least 1 Way to Stand Out, and stay in Good Standing.
global.footerHelper: Your level never goes down. If you fall out of Good Standing, rewards and progress may pause until you're back on track.

1.description: Welcome to PureTask. Finish your first job the right way and you'll start getting booked more often.
1.coreHelper: These steps unlock your account's full booking power.
1.stretchHelper: Complete one to unlock your first boost.
1.maintenanceHelper: Keep things clean and reliable from day one.

2.description: You're building momentum. Consistency here unlocks bigger rewards and faster bookings.
2.coreHelper: Show you can complete jobs, communicate, and keep customers satisfied.
2.stretchHelper: Pick a challenge that matches your schedule.
2.maintenanceHelper: Stay responsive and avoid preventable issues.

3.description: Reliable cleaners earn trust — and trust earns you better visibility and better opportunities.
3.coreHelper: This level proves you show up and finish cleanings consistently.
3.stretchHelper: Choose the path you want to be known for: 5-star ratings, repeat clients, or consistency.
3.maintenanceHelper: Keep disputes off your record to keep your momentum.

4.description: Customers feel confident booking you. This level opens higher-value work and stronger rewards.
4.coreHelper: You've shown you can handle both basic and deep cleanings reliably.
4.stretchHelper: Choose how you stand out: consistency, 5-star volume, or high-demand time slots.
4.maintenanceHelper: Good standing keeps your access and boosts active.

5.description: You're operating like a pro. This level unlocks serious earning upside through better jobs and better economics.
5.coreHelper: Photos, reviews, and reliability are now your main growth levers.
5.stretchHelper: Pick your edge: streak performance, dispute-free consistency, repeat customers, or early-morning demand.
5.maintenanceHelper: Staying active and accepting jobs keeps your pipeline full.

6.description: Elite cleaners get more flexibility and higher leverage — including faster access to earnings.
6.coreHelper: You've proven customer satisfaction and consistency under real volume.
6.stretchHelper: Choose a longer-term commitment goal for bigger upside.
6.maintenanceHelper: Maintain high ratings to keep elite privileges active.

7.description: You're becoming a go-to cleaner. This level is about loyalty, repeat business, and premium job types.
7.coreHelper: Stay dispute-free and keep your rating strong to keep your advantage.
7.stretchHelper: Choose your specialty: move-in/out work, ultra-low cancellations, or high-demand hours.
7.maintenanceHelper: Consistency matters more than ever at this level.

8.description: Masters are scarce. You're competing on excellence — not volume alone.
8.coreHelper: Strong on-time performance plus low disputes is what makes you a Master.
8.stretchHelper: Hit long-term milestones to unlock top-tier economic advantages.

9.description: You're among the best on the platform. You'll unlock the most valuable opportunities when you stay consistent.
9.coreHelper: Keep rating high and disputes extremely low to protect your position.
9.stretchHelper: Build a repeat-client base and long-term reliability for maximum leverage.

10.description: Legends are the backbone of PureTask. You've built long-term trust and elite performance.
10.coreHelper: You're operating at scale with consistent excellence.
10.stretchHelper: Long streaks and a high volume of 5-star reviews represent true mastery.
10.maintenanceHelper: Stay in the top tier of reliability to keep legend privileges active.
